title: 皐月賞の後に・賞賛の方向

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being the daughter of a legendary
Umamusume, King Halo ends up disappointing
her fans at the Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this doesn't deter her. She vows to take first
place in her next race, the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, King Halo returns to the academy to
see Special Week, who professes her desire to win
the Japanese Derby for her mothers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, King Halo becomes further fueled to
gain success, and she decides to put in extra
practice.
